flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Laramie County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Laramie County Community College rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (28.4% → 38.4%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Laramie County Community College are 15% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($44.8k vs $38.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Laramie County Community College rose 13% between 2016 and 2019 (57.7% → 65.0%).
